summary: Phase 3 retest after react-joyride v3 named-import fix. ALL CHECKS PASS. yarn build compiles cleanly producing 4 lazy chunks (Dashboard/Create/Chat/Wizard). /login and / both render without 'Compiled with problems' overlay and with zero JS page errors. Backend /api/health=200 healthy, /api/admin/redeploy returns 401 with no secret and 401 with wrong secret. pytest reports 3 passed, 2 skipped (happy path correctly gated to avoid `git reset --hard`).
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding.jsx now correctly uses named imports `{ Joyride, STATUS }` from react-joyride v3 — verified via `node -e require('react-joyride')` that default export is undefined and Joyride/STATUS are exposed as named exports.
Pre-existing eslint warnings (non-blocking) in CacheContext.js and Dashboard.js about missing useEffect/useCallback dependencies — not part of this iteration's scope but worth cleaning up later.
test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md missing — not required for Phase 3 (auth flows untouched).
context_for_next_testing_agent: react-joyride v3 has NO default export — must use named imports. Build artifacts in /app/frontend/build show 4 lazy chunks as expected (main 158.96 kB + 285/318/247/650/389/557 chunks). Console shows 4x 401 from /api/auth/me on unauthenticated /login load — this is expected/normal (AuthContext probing session). Happy-path redeploy test is gated behind RUN_REDEPLOY_HAPPY_PATH=1 — DO NOT set this unless local==origin/main, since it triggers `git fetch + reset --hard` and would wipe uncommitted work.
rca of the issue: Iteration 8 RCA was: `import Joyride from 'react-joyride'` failed because react-joyride@3.0.2 only exports named symbols (Joyride, STATUS, ACTIONS, EVENTS, LIFECYCLE, useJoyride, etc.) and no default. Fix in iteration 9: changed line 2 of /app/frontend/src/components/Onboarding.jsx to `import { Joyride, STATUS } from 'react-joyride'`. Verified runtime: `Object.keys(require('react-joyride'))` returns ['ACTIONS','EVENTS','Joyride','LIFECYCLE','ORIGIN','PORTAL_ELEMENT_ID','STATUS','defaultLocale','defaultOptions','useJoyride'] and default is undefined.
